nasb.text: I will sing a new song to You, O God; Upon a harp of ten strings I will sing praises to You,

esv.text: I will sing a new song to you, O God; upon a ten-stringed harp I will play to you,

cnv.text: 神啊！我要向你唱新歌， 我要用十弦琴向你歌唱。

ccb.text: 上帝啊，我要向你唱新歌， 用十弦琴歌颂你。

csbs.text: 神哪，我要向你唱新歌， 用十弦的里拉琴歌颂你！
